creator: markd@grizzly.com
text:
FreeBSD 2.0 includes a great deal of GNU software, however the info
files are not included in srcdist or mandist (they are in the source tree).
These files contain a lot of valuable information on how to use these pieces
of software.

The follow GNU software included with FreeBSD 2.0 has info files.
        libreadline
        as
        cvs
        dc
        gdb
        ptx
        send-pr
        texinfo
        gcc
        uucp

Fix: 

Include the info files, along with a dir file in /usr/share/info,
perhaps as part of the mandist.
